description: CompositionRed and black flip flops with rubber insole and graphic, EVA midsole and TPR outsole, synthetic straps with heat transfer logo and twill tape toe separatorsCare1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washEnjoy summer in these fierce red flip flops from spalding. The graphic of the Basketball player dunking the ball is inspired by the sport. The red insole is soft and yellow EVA midsole makes the footwear lightweight and cushioned. The wide straps ensure a snug Fit and the twill tape toe separators give added comfort. The TPR outsole with subtle lug detailing enhances grip and stability.
